categories.label: Slash Commands
categories.description: Discord application commands — type / in chat.

commands.name: setup
commands.description: Manage the City of Angels server setup system (channels, roles, permissions).

subcommands.name: channels
subcommands.description: Create or update the City of Angels channel layout.

subcommands.name: roles
subcommands.description: Create or update City of Angels setup roles.

subcommands.name: permissions
subcommands.description: Reapply City of Angels channel permissions.

subcommands.name: delete-channels
subcommands.description: Delete all setup-created channels and categories.

subcommands.name: reset-server
subcommands.description: Delete setup items and rebuild the safe layout.

commands.name: setup-erlc-roles
commands.description: Create or sync the in-game role hierarchy.

commands.name: fix-erlc-role-order
commands.description: Reapply the role hierarchy order without touching channels.

commands.name: fix-erlc-channel-permissions
commands.description: Fix existing category and channel permission overwrites.

commands.name: server-status
commands.description: Live Discord server overview embed. Auto-refreshes every 30 seconds.

commands.name: server-roles
commands.description: Paginated list of every role in the server.

commands.name: ticket-panel
commands.description: Send the City of Angels support ticket panel to a channel.

commands.name: status
commands.description: Live Discord server status overview (same as /server-status).

commands.name: purge
commands.description: Bulk-delete messages in the current channel (skips pinned).

commands.name: roles
commands.description: Show server roles list (prefix version of /server-roles).

commands.name: level
commands.description: Check your or another member's XP level and rank.

commands.name: levels
commands.description: Show the server XP leaderboard.

commands.name: addxp
commands.description: Grant XP to a member manually.

commands.name: setuproles
commands.description: Post the reaction-role setup panel in the current channel.

commands.name: testwelcome
commands.description: Preview the welcome message for yourself in the current channel.

categories.label: Session Commands
categories.description: In-game session vote, start, and end controls.

commands.name: session
commands.description: Manage in-game session votes and roster.

subcommands.name: vote
subcommands.description: Open a session vote with Ready / Out buttons.

subcommands.name: status
subcommands.description: Show current session status and readiness.

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.description: Show who is Ready vs Out.

categories.label: Automatic Systems
categories.description: Features that run without a direct command.

commands.name: Welcome System
commands.description: Sends a branded welcome embed when a member joins City of Angels.

commands.name: Leveling System
commands.description: Members earn XP from messages. Use .level and .levels to view progress.

commands.name: Ticket System
commands.description: Support tickets via the /ticket-panel and button interactions.

commands.name: Reaction Roles
commands.description: Self-assign roles using reaction-role panel buttons.

commands.name: Mention Responder
commands.description: Veltrix responds when @mentioned with helpful info.

commands.name: Session Logs
commands.description: Session activity logging for staff channels.
